title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Fable 5 capabilities with focus on harness engineering and loops for AI automation. Video covers open source versus closed source AI model considerations, risks of relying on proprietary models, and implications of model shutdowns for regulated industries.
writeup: Cyril Imhof examines Claude Fable 5 with an emphasis on harness engineering and loops as mechanisms for AI automation. The discussion weighs open source against closed source foundation models, including the risks of depending on proprietary systems and what model shutdowns mean for regulated industries. The framing draws on prompt engineering, loops, and test-time compute.
